name: ExtensionConditionDefinition_Code
title: R5: Identification of the condition, problem or diagnosis (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConditionDefinition.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConditionDefinition.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ConditionDefinition.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConditionDefinition.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ConditionDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ConditionDefinition.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Identification of the condition, problem or diagnosis (new)
